Next Evangelion Moderoid Model Kit is Mari’s Eva Unit-08

The next Moderoid Evangelion model kit is based on one of the Eva Unit-08 variants that Mari pilots in the Rebuild movies.

The post Next Evangelion Moderoid Model Kit is Mari’s Eva Unit-08 appeared first on Siliconera.

Duskbloods and Elden Ring Tarnished Edition are both apparently still on track for a 2026 Switch 2 release.

Sonic the Hedgehog 35th Anniversary Crocs Appear Next Week

Crocs is working with Sega again on even more Sonic the Hedgehog classic clog shoes and Jibbitz charms.
